name: HR teams in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month tool
description: For HR teams in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, inaccurate payroll data causes compliance issues. We provide a payroll data reconciliation tool instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
target_audience: HR teams in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month
problem_solved: Inaccurate payroll data reconciliation leading to compliance issues.
features: comparison of benefits and tax withholdings

locked_fields.primary_user: HR teams in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month
locked_fields.primary_problem: Inaccurate payroll data reconciliation leading to compliance issues.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For HR teams in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, inaccurate payroll data causes compliance issues. We provide a payroll data reconciliation tool instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
must_have_features: comparison of benefits and tax withholdings

one_liner: For HR teams in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, inaccurate payroll data causes compliance issues. We provide a payroll data reconciliation tool instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
